Sign-in: Google may block sign-in inside this app’s browser. Open airwaveempire.com in Safari or Chrome (⋯ menu → “Open in Browser” / “Open in Safari”).
AIRWAVE EMPIRE
PLAY YOUR FIRST GAME -- FREE!

Sign in with your Airwave Empire account — email or social — to unlock the scenario selector.

By creating an account, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

AIRWAVE EMPIRE
MULTIPLAYER
MARKETS

The host picks the city once everyone is in the waiting room.

  • Atlanta
  • Nashville
  • New York
  • Los Angeles
  • Chicago
STARTING ERAS

The host picks the start year when creating a room (CREATE GAME tab):

  • 1970s — AM-heavy opening, full arc through 2020
  • 1978 — FM overtakes AM; lean early years
  • 1985 — CHR / classic rock peak; harder opening
ACCOUNT

By creating an account, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

SERVER ADDRESS
Connecting…
YOUR COMPANY'S NAME
STARTING ERA
Start in 1970 — AM dominates, FM is wide open. Host picks the market in the waiting room. Full 50-year arc.
ROOM CODE

Free accounts can accept any invite—the host’s city is chosen by whoever created the room.

Use this if you were already in a game and got disconnected, hit refresh, or lost your connection. Enter the same room code and the same company name you used when you joined.

ROOM CODE
ROOM CODE
Share this code with other players
PLAYERS
MARKET
All players must be connected. You can start with 2–4.
Waiting for host to start the game…
The host already chose the start era when creating the room; they pick the market here before the draft. Your plan does not need to match the city—you’re joining their game.

STATION DRAFT

You start with . Buying a second station costs its market value — deducted from your starting cash.

GENERAL MANAGER CAREER
CORPORATE EXPECTATIONS
CURRENT STANDING
START GENERAL MANAGER CAREER

Enter your name as General Manager. Your employer is the broadcast group that owns the station license — edit the generated name or roll a new one.

GENERAL MANAGER CAREER
ASSIGNMENT COMPLETE
SEND FEEDBACK

What should we improve? Bugs, balance, clarity — everything helps.

Resumes normal play from Spring 2026 onward.
